summary: All 10 core calculators remain undiscovered by Google. Internal links strengthened, 5 obsolete URLs set to 410, guide improved. Sitemaps resubmitted. Awaiting Google crawl.

core_calculators.verdict: Pages are technically perfect. Google has not crawled them yet — sitemap resubmitted to prompt discovery.

410_gone_via_proxy.fallback: If proxy doesn't match, pages return 404 (route handler) — acceptable alternative

guide_calculator_links.effect: All 125 guide pages now show up to 5 related calculator links

urls_intentionally_unchanged.canonical_lang_variants: 33 pages with ?lang=xx — canonical points correctly, no action
urls_intentionally_unchanged.noindex_pages: 16 pages — all intentional (scenarios + geo + formula tools)
urls_intentionally_unchanged.discovered_not_indexed_cleanup: ~1,970 pages — V2 cleanup lag, will drop naturally
urls_intentionally_unchanged.discovered_not_indexed_important: ~20 important pages — need Google to crawl

recommended_waiting_period: 7 days before checking GSC for crawl progress
